items.headline_en: last30days-skill v3.1.0 Adds X Search Backend, Competitor Auto-Discovery, and @/u Handle Attribution
items.summary_en: v3.1.0 consolidates releases v3.0.10–3.0.14 and adds a new xurl CLI as an alternative X search backend, a --competitors flag for auto-discovered comparison fan-out, @ and u/ handle attribution in evidence lines, configurable memory directory for Codex, and improved subreddit expansion.

items.headline_en: OpenAI Releases GPT Image 2 with Flexible Sizing, Token Pricing, and 50% Batch Discount
items.summary_en: OpenAI released GPT Image 2, a new image generation and editing model supporting flexible output sizes, high-fidelity input, and token-based pricing. The Batch API offers a 50% discount. The Agents SDK also gained controlled sandbox execution, customizable test harnesses, and memory control.

items.headline_en: NVIDIA Open-Sources Isaac GR00T N1.7, a Reasoning-Enabled VLA Model for Humanoid Robots
items.summary_en: NVIDIA open-sourced Isaac GR00T N1.7, a Vision-Language-Action model designed for humanoid robots with reasoning capabilities. The model is available on Hugging Face.

items.headline_en: OpenAI Codex v0.123.0 Adds Amazon Bedrock Provider, /mcp Verbose Mode, and Plugin Loading Fixes
items.summary_en: Codex v0.123.0 adds a built-in Amazon Bedrock model provider with configurable AWS profiles, a new /mcp verbose command for full MCP diagnostics, and improved .mcp.json plugin loading for background agents.

items.headline_en: MiniMax Launches Music 2.6 with Cover Feature and M2.7 Self-Improving Agent Model
items.summary_en: MiniMax released Music 2.6 with a new Cover feature featuring deeper bass and richer instrumentation. M2.7 enables recursive self-improvement for models with significant practical capability gains over M2.5, alongside an Agent harness for production-grade coding and complex office task support.

items.headline_en: Replicate Publishes Agent Skills for Claude Code, Codex, and Other Coding Assistants
items.summary_en: Replicate published Agent Skills — markdown instruction files that give coding assistants expert knowledge on model discovery, comparison, API execution, and prompting for image and video generation. They follow the open Agent Skills spec and work with Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, and other compatible tools.
items.evidence_excerpt: Changelog RSS Atom li]:pb-8"> Agent skills for Replicate April 21, 2026 Replicate now publishes agent skills , a collection of markdown instruction files that give coding assistants expert knowledge about working with AI models on Replicate. Skills cover model discovery, comparison, and execution via the API, along with detailed prompting techniques for image generation and video generation models. They follow the open Agent Skills spec and work with Claude Code, OpenCode, OpenAI Codex, and other compatible tools. Install Copy npx skills add replicate/skills This installs all of Replicate’s skills into your project and configures them for your coding assistant automatically. Skills and MCP Skills are complementary to Replicate’s MCP server . MCP gives your coding assistant API tools. Sk...
items.target_summary: Changelog RSS Atom li]:pb-8"> Agent skills for Replicate April 21, 2026 Replicate now publishes agent skills , a collection of markdown instruction files that give coding assistants expert knowledge about working with AI models on Replicate. Skills cover mo...
items.target_excerpt: Changelog RSS Atom li]:pb-8"> Agent skills for Replicate April 21, 2026 Replicate now publishes agent skills , a collection of markdown instruction files that give coding assistants expert knowledge about working with AI models on Replicate. Skills cover model discovery, comparison, and execution via the API, along with detailed prompting techniques for image generation and video generation models. They follow the open Agent Skills spec and work with Claude Code, OpenCode, OpenAI Codex, and other compatible tools. Install Copy npx skills add replicate/skills This installs all of Replicate’s skills into your project and configures them for your coding assistant automatically. Skills and MCP Skills are complementary to Replicate’s MCP server . MCP gives your coding assistant API tools. Skills give it knowledge about how to use those tools well: which models to choose, how to write prompts, and what tradeoffs to consider. For more details, see the agent skills reference or the GitHub repository . Fallback model for Nano Banana Pro March 2, 2026 Nano Banana Pro can now fall back to a backup model (currently ByteDance Seedream 5.0 lite ) when Google’s API is at capacity, instead of f...

items.headline_en: Replicate Pricing Clarified: Compute-Time Billing for Public Models, Token-Based for Others
items.summary_en: Replicate's pricing page explains its pay-per-use model: most public models are billed by compute time (per second, varying by hardware tier), while others use input/output token pricing. Examples include Claude 3.7 Sonnet at $3.00/M input tokens and Flux 1.1 Pro for text-to-image.
items.evidence_excerpt: Pricing – Replicate Try Seedance 2.0 from ByteDance Replicate glyph Explore Pricing Enterprise Docs Blog Sign in Try for free Menu Explore Pricing Enterprise Docs Blog Sign in Try for free Compare models in the Playground Pricing You only pay for what you use on Replicate. Some models are billed by hardware and time, others by input and output. Public models Thousands of open-source machine learning models have been contributed by our community and more are added every day. We also host a wide variety of proprietary models. Most models are billed by the time they take to run. The price-per-second varies according to the hardware in use. When running or training one of these public models, you only pay for the time it takes to process your request. Some models are billed by input and out...

items.headline_en: Cohere Retires Embed v2.0 and Aya Expanse/Vision 8B Models
items.summary_en: Effective April 4, 2026, Cohere retired five model IDs: embed-english-v2.0, embed-english-light-v2.0, embed-multilingual-v2.0, c4ai-aya-expanse-8b, and c4ai-aya-vision-8b. Suggested replacements include embed-v4.0 for embedding tasks and command-a-reasoning-08-2025 for chat tasks.
